issues.description: RevealFromHand is incorrect. Card text states 'Reveal 1 card from the top of your deck' — should be RevealFromDeck, not RevealFromHand
GiveDon action is incomplete. Card text requires two outcomes: (1) add DON!! card, and (2) rest it. Current DSL only adds DON but does not rest it. Missing Rest action in thenActions

Conditional logic missing. Effect should only trigger GiveDon + Rest IF revealed card has cost ≤2. Current structure applies filter to reveal but doesn't gate the subsequent actions properly on that condition
